title: Table Cloth Clips for Outside Inside Table 10 Pack, Leaf Shape Picnic Tablecloth Holder Clip Large Stainless Steel Decorative Cover Clamp for Heavy Duty Party Wedding Restaurant Camping Essential
features: Securely holds tablecloths in place: With our Leaves Table Cloth Holder Clips, you no longer have to worry about tablecloths slipping or blowing away during outdoor gatherings or windy conditions. These clips provide a firm grip, keeping your tablecloth securely in place.

Versatile and adjustable: Our Large Table Cloth Holder Clips are designed to fit different table thicknesses, making them suitable for a wide range of table sizes(max thickness 1.58 inches). Their adjustable design ensures a snug fit, allowing you to easily adapt them to various tables, such as rectangle tables, patio round tables, camping tables, square tables, and outside portable dining tables.

Durable and long-lasting: Made from high-quality stainless steel materials, our Table Cloth Holder Clips are built to withstand repeated use. They are resistant to rust and corrosion, ensuring their longevity and reliability.

Easy to use and remove: These picnic table cloth clips are incredibly easy to use. Simply attach them to the edges of your tablecloth, and they will fasten securely to the table. Removing them is just as effortless, making cleanup a breeze. At the same time, you can also hang and store all kinds of belongings on it, better free your hands.

Essential for outdoor events and picnics: Whether you're hosting an outdoor backyard BBQ, RV camping,picnic, or beach party, our tablecloth holder clips are essential accessories. They eliminate the hassle of constantly readjusting tablecloths, allowing you and your guests to enjoy your outdoor gathering without interruptions.
description: Product Description CUNGLIN: Where Elegance Meets Unshakeable Grip Picture this: A sun-drenched garden wedding. Linen drapes like liquid gold over tables, champagne flutes gleaming… until a breeze sweeps through. Napkins take flight, cloths billow chaos. In that moment, CUNGLIN was born—not just to solve a problem, but to protect moments that matter. We Believe Perfection Lies in the Unseen While others make clips, we engineer silent guardians. Each CUNGLIN tablecloth clip is a fusion of minimalist artistry and relentless physics: Leaf, Butterfly, Tulip, Lucky Clover& Claw designs—sculpted to be jewelry for your table. Patented Design that adapt to any thickness (0-4cm+), biting firmly yet gently into wood, marble, or rattan (no scratches, no slips). CUNGLIN: Hold tight to joy. Let go of worry From Michelin-Starred Chefs to Your Sunday Brunch When a Napa Valley vineyard chose CUNGLIN butterflies for its 50-table harvest feast, they whispered: “They disappeared into the beauty—until the storm hit. Then they became heroes.” That’s our magic: invisible strength, unforgettable grace. Why "Cling" is in Our DNA CUNGLIN isn’t just a name—it’s a promise. Like ivy on stone, our clips cling without compromise. Tested in gale-force winds at Scottish cliffs, monsoon rains in Bali, and toddler tornadoes in Texas backyards. Result? Zero escapes. 100% serenity. Small Clip, Big Conscience Built for Generations: Solid Stainless Steel bodies outlive trends. Carbon-Neutral Craft: Each recycled steel clip is born in a solar-powered factory. Give-Back Grip: For every 10000 clips sold, we clean 1kg of ocean plastic. Rust-Proof Durability Material Extreme Heat Resistance & Anti-Corrosion: Withstands 800°C intermittent heat, Passes 200h salt spray test (ASTM B117) for outdoor/indoor use High Strength, Zero Warping: ≥310 MPa tensile strength (vs. 304 steel’s 205 MPa) Sustainable Material Science: 100% recyclable (ISO 14021 compliant), Lower CO2 vs. Zinc/Polymer Leaf Tablecloth Clip Claw Tablecloth Clip Butterfly Tablecloth Clip Tablecloth Strap White Tablecloth Strap Black Maple Leaf Tablecloth Clips Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 731 4.3 out of 5 stars 282 4.4 out of 5 stars 356 4.5 out of 5 stars 79 4.5 out of 5 stars 147 4.3 out of 5 stars 34 Shape Leaf Claw Butterfly Rectangle Rectangle Maple Leaf Number of Clips 10 10 10 5 5 6 Adjustable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Visible on the table ✓ ✓ ✓ Invisible Invisible Invisible Material Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Polyester Polyester Stainless Steel Applicable Table Thickness ≤4cm ≤4cm ≤4cm All Table Thickness All Table Thickness All Table Thickness
